rationale.R1.2: The section contains an internal logical contradiction: SA is first defined as crediting both correct answers on clear prompts AND clarifying questions on ambiguous prompts, but the operative formula given later counts only correct answers on clear prompts divided by 800 — omitting ambiguous-prompt performance from the numerator entirely. Resolving this inconsistency is load-bearing if logical review is the ask.
rationale.R1.3: The conclusion states 'all four agents scored above 60% SA' but the reported Llama 3 70B score is 52.8%, directly contradicting the claim. Whether this is a factual error or a typo must be caught if evidence-claim alignment is in scope.
